challenge_summary: Post-revision re-review. Original 3 must_fix resolved. 3 new must_fix found and immediately fixed: (1) JSON inventory reconciliation with excludedAssignments array for ArcBox, (2) SQL AD-only auth ARM path corrected to azureADOnlyAuthentications child resource, (3) Anomaly detection separated from budget resource. 1 should_fix noted and fixed: OIDC workload identity marked as conditional/unverified.
fixes_applied: JSON reconciliation: Added discovery_reconciliation object + excludedAssignments array (6 ArcBox entries)
SQL path: Corrected to Microsoft.Sql/servers/azureADOnlyAuthentications/default.properties.azureADOnlyAuthentication with AVM mapping note
Anomaly detection: Separated from budget resource description, added CostManagement/scheduledActions reference
OIDC: Marked as conditional/unverified, added validation task, interactive MFA as only proven path
